name: netconf-tool
description: Netconf Device Management Tool - A modern web-based tool for managing network devices via NETCONF protocol

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.package: npm run build && cd backend && npm run pkg
scripts.package:win: npm run build && cd backend && npm run pkg:win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && cd backend && npm run pkg:linux
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && cd backend && npm run pkg:mac
